Knicks 91, Celtics 85

Final New York Knicks 91 Boston Celtics 85

Brunson leads Knicks past Celtics

Jalen Brunson scored 28 points and the Knicks used a late defensive stand to beat Boston in Game 4.

The Celtics missed their final six shots while New York controlled the defensive glass.
